import sys
from collections import defaultdict

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    N = int(data[0])
    color_min = defaultdict(lambda: float('inf'))
    
    index = 1
    for _ in range(N):
        A = int(data[index])
        C = int(data[index + 1])
        index += 2
        if A < color_min[C]:
            color_min[C] = A
    
    print(max(color_min.values()))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
